title: Newton Square Shopping Center Renovations, Newton, PA - PH&C
excerpt: Renovation of this popular suburban shopping center located in Newtown Square, PA. Updating the façade appearance to a more modern design.
contentHtml:
Owner invested in a needed renovation of this popular suburban shopping center, updating the façade appearance to a more modern design, improving the pedestrian circulation and accessibility, and increasing the lighting levels, and electrical efficiency of the site lighting. PH&C oversaw the project’s execution in this open and operating shopping center, while saving the owner costs by value engineering certain design aspect, and prime contracting of various specialty contractors. 

Key Features:

  • Complete Facade Renovations (5 Buildings) in operating shopping center.
  • Roof canopies replacement.
  • Pedestrian accessibility and site improvements
  • Site Lighting and monument sign replacement/upgrades

Visit their site HERE or check out some of our other Retail Developments.
